Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* In this file we show that for any category C,
   the monoidal category of pointed functors of C is equivalent to
   the monoidal category of monoidal-pointed objects in the monoidal category of pointed functors of C.

   By equivalence, we mean that these two monoidal categories
   are (internally) equivalent as objects in the bicategory of monoidal categories
*)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.Monoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.TotalMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.coslicecat.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.

(* The monoidal categories of endofunctors that we compare are defined in the following files: *)
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Examples.MonoidalPointedObjects.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.PointedFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.EndofunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.

(* The notion of internal adjoint equivalences in a bicategory is defined in: *)
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.

(* The necessary bicategories *)
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.BicatOfWhiskeredMonCats.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispAdjunctions.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section PointedFunctorsIdempotentGeneralMonoidalCats.

  Context {V : category} (Mon_V : monoidal V).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
adjoint_equivalence
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
adjoint_equivalence
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bicat_of_cats
⟦ coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)) ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bicat_of_cats
⟦ coslice_cat_total
    (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
    (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V) ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
  (?f · ?g)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats 
  (?g · ?f)
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
        (monoidal_unit
           (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
vcomp2
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2 (vcomp2 (linvunitor ?f) (rwhisker ?f ?η))
        (rassociator ?f ?g ?f)) 
     (lwhisker ?f ?ε)) (runitor ?f) = 
id2 ?f
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
vcomp2
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2 (vcomp2 (rinvunitor ?g) (lwhisker ?g ?η))
        (lassociator ?g ?f ?g)) 
     (rwhisker ?g ?ε)) (lunitor ?g) = 
id2 ?g
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
is_invertible_2cell ?η
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
is_invertible_2cell ?ε

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bicat_of_cats
⟦ coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)) ⟧
 exact (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bicat_of_cats
⟦ coslice_cat_total
    (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
    (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V) ⟧
 exact (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
  (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
 exact (unit_ptdob Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
  (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
        (monoidal_unit
           (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
 exact (counit_ptdob Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
vcomp2
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2 (linvunitor (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V))
           (rwhisker (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
              (unit_ptdob Mon_V)))
        (rassociator (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
           (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
           (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)))
     (lwhisker (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
        (counit_ptdob Mon_V)))
  (runitor (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)) =
id2 (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
has_homsets
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∏ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
vcomp2
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2 (linvunitor (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V))
           (rwhisker (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
              (unit_ptdob Mon_V)))
        (rassociator (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
           (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
           (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)))
     (lwhisker (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
        (counit_ptdob Mon_V)))
  (runitor (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)) x =
id2 (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
has_homsets
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
 apply homset_property.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
pr1
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2
           (vcomp2
              (linvunitor (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V))
              (rwhisker (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
                 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)))
           (rassociator (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)

        (lwhisker (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
           (counit_ptdob Mon_V)))
     (runitor (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)) x) =
pr1 (id2 (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V x))
     (pr2 (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V x))) 
  ?p

     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2

              (counit_ptdob Mon_V)))
        (runitor (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)) x)) =

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
identity (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)
· identity (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x) =
identity (pr1 x)

Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
identity (pr1 x) = identity (pr1 x)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
pr1
  (vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2
           (vcomp2
              (rinvunitor (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V))
              (lwhisker (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)))
           (lassociator (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
              (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
              (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)))
        (rwhisker (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
           (counit_ptdob Mon_V)))
     (lunitor (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)) x) =
pr1 (id2 (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, x': coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
f: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V) ⟦ x, x'
⟧
# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
  f
· (identity
     (pr1
        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x')),,
   id_right
     (pr2
        (identity
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           x'))) =
(identity
   (pr1
      ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
 id_right
   (pr2
      (identity
         (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
· # (identity
       (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f

x, x': coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)

   · (identity

         id_right

  ((identity

    id_right

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
  (((λ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
     identity
       (pr1
          ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
            · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
     id_right
       (pr2
          (identity
             (coslice_cat_total V
                (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
    :
    nat_trans_data
      (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
      (identity
         (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))),,
   ((λ (x
        x' : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
          ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
     total2_paths_f
       (id_right
          (pr1
             (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
        ! id_left
            (pr1
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
       (let X :=
          λ (C : category) (a b : C)
          (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
          pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
        X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
          (pr1
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
          (pr2
             ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
               · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
           · pr1
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                 id_right
                   (pr2
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V (...)) x)))
                · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
          (pr2
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
          (transportf
             (mor_disp
                (pr2
                   ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
             (id_right
                (pr1
                   (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
              ! id_left
                  (pr1
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
             (pr2
                (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                 · (identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x')),,
                    id_right
                      (pr2
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            x'))))))
          (pr2
             ((identity
                 (pr1
                    ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
               id_right
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
              · # (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))))
    :
    (λ t : nat_trans_data
             (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V))),
     is_nat_trans
       (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
       (identity
          (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
       t)
      ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
        identity
          (pr1
             ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
               · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
        id_right
          (pr2
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))))) =
id2
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))

Mon_V: monoidal V
has_homsets
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∏ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
  ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
    identity
      (pr1
         ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
    id_right
      (pr2
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            x0))),,
   (λ (x0
       x' : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
    (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
    total2_paths_f
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
       ! id_left
           (pr1
              (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) 
         (a b : C) (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
         pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr1
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
         (pr2
            ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)
          · pr1
              ((identity
                  (pr1
                     ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
                id_right
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x0)))
               · # (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0))
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (pr2
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                       ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x')),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...)) x'))))))
         (pr2
            ((identity
                (pr1
                   ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
              id_right
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x0)))
             · # (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
  x =
id2
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x

  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
 apply homset_property.

                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0))
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (pr2
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                           x')),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           x'))))))
         (pr2
            ((identity
                (pr1
                   ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
              id_right
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x0)))
             · # (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
  x =
id2
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
  ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
    identity
      (pr1
         ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
    id_right
      (pr2
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            x))),,
   (λ (x
       x' : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
    (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
    total2_paths_f
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
       ! id_left
           (pr1
              (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) (a b : C)
         (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
         pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr1
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
         (pr2
            ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
          · pr1
              ((identity
                  (pr1
                     ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                id_right
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
               · # (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (pr2
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                           x')),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           x'))))))
         (pr2
            ((identity
                (pr1
                   ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
              id_right
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
             · # (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
  x =
id2
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
pr1
  (vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
     ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
       id_right
         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))),,
      (λ (x
          x' : coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
       (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
         (let X :=
            λ (C : category) (a b : C)
            (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
            pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
          X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            (pr1
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
            (pr2
               ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
             · pr1
                 ((identity
                     (pr1
                        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           x)))
                  · # (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
                ! id_left
                    (pr1
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                          f)))
               (pr2
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                   · (identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x')),,
                      id_right
                        (pr2
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              x'))))))
            (pr2
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                 id_right
                   (pr2
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
                · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
     x) =
pr1
  (id2
     (identity
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (identity
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           x))
     (pr2
        (identity
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           x))) ?p
  (pr2
     (vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
        ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
          identity
            (pr1
               ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
          id_right
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))),,
         (λ (x
             x' : coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
          (f : coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
          total2_paths_f
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (let X :=
               λ (C : category) 
               (a b : C) 
               (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
               pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
             X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               (pr1
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
                · pr1
                    ((identity (pr1 ((...) x)),,
                      id_right
                       (pr2 (identity (...) x)))
                     · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
               (transportf
                  (mor_disp
                     (pr2
                       ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                     (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
                  (id_right
                     (pr1
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
                   ! id_left
                       (pr1
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                      · 
                      (identity (pr1 (... x')),,
                       id_right
                       (pr2 (identity ... x'))))))
               (pr2
                  ((identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x)),,
                    id_right
                      (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V ...) x)))
                   · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
        x)) =
pr2
  (id2
     (identity
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x)

Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)

  (mor_disp

           x))

        ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V

                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
          id_right

                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))),,

                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))

            (let X :=

             X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               (pr1

                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
                · pr1

                      id_right
                        (pr2 (identity (...) x)))
                     · # (identity

                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                         f))

                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                     (pr2

                           x')))
                  (id_right
                     (pr1
                        (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                            · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                           f)) @
                   ! id_left
                       (pr1
                          (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob
                                  Mon_V) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                      · (identity (pr1 (... x')),,
                         id_right
                           (pr2 (identity ... x'))))))
               (pr2
                  ((identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x)),,
                    id_right
                      (pr2
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            x)))
                   · # (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
        x)) =
pr2
  (id2
     (identity
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
(λ _ : vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
         (((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
            identity
              (pr1
                 ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
            id_right
              (pr2
                 (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
           :
           nat_trans_data
             (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))),,
          ((λ (x
               x' : coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            (f : coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
            total2_paths_f
              (id_right
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
               ! id_left
                   (pr1
                      (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
              (let X :=
                 λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                 (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                 (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                 pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
               X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                 (pr1
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
                 (pr2
                    ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
                  · pr1
                      ((identity (pr1 (...)),,
                        id_right (pr2 (...)))
                       · # (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V
                                 (...))) f))
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
                 (transportf
                    (mor_disp
                       (pr2
                          ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                            · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                             x))
                       (pr2
                          (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (...)) x')))
                    (id_right (pr1 (# (... · ...) f)) @
                     ! id_left (pr1 (# (... · ...) f)))
                    (pr2
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                          f
                        · (identity (pr1 ...),,
                           id_right (pr2 ...)))))
                 (pr2
                    ((identity (pr1 (... x)),,
                      id_right (pr2 (identity ... x)))
                     · # (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total V
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                         f))))
           :
           (λ t : nat_trans_data
                    (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))),
            is_nat_trans
              (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
               · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) t)
             ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
               identity

                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
               id_right
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
              :
              nat_trans_data
                (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                (identity
                   (coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))))) =
       id2
         (identity

   (((λ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
      identity

         ! id_left
             (pr1
                (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
        (let X :=
           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
           (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
           pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
         X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
           (pr1
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
           (pr2
              ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
            · pr1
                ((identity (pr1 (... x)),,
                  id_right (pr2 (identity ... x)))
                 · # (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
           (pr2
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
           (transportf
              (mor_disp
                 (pr2
                    ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
              (id_right
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
               ! id_left
                   (pr1
                      (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
              (pr2
                 (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                  · (identity (pr1 (...)),,
                     id_right (pr2 (...))))))
           (pr2
              ((identity (pr1 ((...) x)),,
                id_right (pr2 (identity (...) x)))
               · # (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))))
     :
     (λ t : nat_trans_data
              (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
               · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))),
      is_nat_trans
        (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
        (identity
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
        t)
       ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
         identity
           (pr1
              ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
         id_right
           (pr2
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
        :
        nat_trans_data
          (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
          (identity
             (coslice_cat_total V
                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))))
   (unit_ptdob Mon_V) =
 id2
   (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V))
  (nat_trans_eq
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (identity
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
     (identity
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
     (vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
        ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
          identity
            (pr1
               ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
          id_right
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))),,
         (λ (x
             x' : coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
          (f : coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
          total2_paths_f
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (let X :=
               λ (C : category) (a b : C)
               (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
               pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
             X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               (pr1
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
                · pr1
                    ((identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x)),,
                      id_right
                        (pr2
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              x)))
                     · # (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total V
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                         f))
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
               (transportf
                  (mor_disp
                     (pr2
                        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           x')))
                  (id_right
                     (pr1
                        (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                            · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                           f)) @
                   ! id_left
                       (pr1
                          (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob
                                  Mon_V) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                      · (identity (pr1 ((...) x')),,
                         id_right
                           (pr2 (identity (...) x'))))))
               (pr2
                  ((identity
                      (pr1
                         ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                            x)),,
                    id_right
                      (pr2
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                            x)))
                   · # (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))))))
     (id2
        (identity
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
     (λ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
      total2_paths_f
        (id_right
           (pr1
              (id2
                 (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x)))
        (let X :=
           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
           (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
           pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
         X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
           (pr1
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))
           (pr2
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)
            · pr1
                (id2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x))
           (pr2
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))
           (transportf
              (mor_disp
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
              (id_right
                 (pr1
                    (id2
                       (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x)))
              (pr2
                 (vcomp2 (unit_ptdob Mon_V)
                    ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total V
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
                      identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x0)),,
                      id_right
                        (pr2
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              x0))),,
                     (λ (x0
                         x' : coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                      (f : coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
                      total2_paths_f
                        (id_right (pr1 (# ... f)) @
                         ! id_left (pr1 (# ... f)))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                           pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1)
                           in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr1 (identity ... x'))
                           (pr2 (...) · pr1 (...))
                           (pr2 (identity ... x'))
                           (transportf
                              (mor_disp ... ...)
                              (... @ ! ...) (pr2 ...))
                           (pr2 (... · ...))))) x)))
           (pr2
              (id2
                 (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) x)))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
has_homsets
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∏ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
vcomp2
  ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
    identity
      (pr1
         ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
    id_right
      (pr2
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            x0))),,
   (λ (x0
       x' : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
    (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
    total2_paths_f
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
       ! id_left
           (pr1
              (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) 
         (a b : C) (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
         pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr1
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
         (pr2
            ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)
          · pr1
              ((identity
                  (pr1
                     ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
                id_right
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x0)))
               · # (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0))
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (pr2
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                       ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x')),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...)) x'))))))
         (pr2
            ((identity
                (pr1
                   ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
              id_right
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x0)))
             · # (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
  (unit_ptdob Mon_V) x =
id2
  (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
  x

  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
 apply homset_property.

Mon_V: monoidal V
∏ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
vcomp2
  ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
    identity
      (pr1
         ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,

            x0))),,

       x' : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
    (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
    total2_paths_f
      (id_right
         (pr1

                · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
       ! id_left
           (pr1

                  · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) (a b : C)
         (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
         pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr1
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
         (pr2
            ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)
          · pr1
              ((identity
                  (pr1
                     ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
                id_right
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x0)))
               · # (identity

                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))

               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))

               (pr2

               (pr2

            (id_right

                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1

                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (pr2
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                           x')),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           x'))))))
         (pr2
            ((identity
                (pr1
                   ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x0)),,
              id_right
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x0)))
             · # (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))

id2
  (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
  x

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
pr1
  (vcomp2
     ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
       id_right
         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))),,
      (λ (x
          x' : coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
       (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
         (let X :=
            λ (C : category) (a b : C)
            (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
            pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
          X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            (pr1
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
            (pr2
               ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
             · pr1
                 ((identity
                     (pr1
                        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           x)))
                  · # (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
                ! id_left
                    (pr1
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                          f)))
               (pr2
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                   · (identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x')),,
                      id_right
                        (pr2
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              x'))))))
            (pr2
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                 id_right
                   (pr2
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
                · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
     (unit_ptdob Mon_V) x) =
pr1
  (id2
     (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
     (pr2
        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (vcomp2
        ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
          identity
            (pr1
               ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
          id_right
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))),,
         (λ (x
             x' : coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
          (f : coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V) ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
          total2_paths_f
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
            (let X :=
               λ (C : category) 
               (a b : C) 
               (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
               pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
             X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               (pr1
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
                · pr1
                    ((identity (pr1 ((...) x)),,
                      id_right
                       (pr2 (identity (...) x)))
                     · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
               (transportf
                  (mor_disp
                     (pr2
                       ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                     (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
                  (id_right
                     (pr1
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
                   ! id_left
                       (pr1
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                      · 
                      (identity (pr1 (... x')),,
                       id_right
                       (pr2 (identity ... x'))))))
               (pr2
                  ((identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x)),,
                    id_right
                      (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V ...) x)))
                   · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
        (unit_ptdob Mon_V) x)) =
pr2
  (id2
     (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)

                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,

                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))

             ! id_left

            (let X :=
               λ (C : category) (a b : C)

               pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in

                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))

                     (pr2

                  (id_right

                   ! id_left

                              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob
                                  Mon_V) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                      · (identity (pr1 (... x')),,
                         id_right
                           (pr2 (identity ... x'))))))
               (pr2

        (unit_ptdob Mon_V) x)) =

  (id2
     (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
pr1
  (vcomp2
     ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
       identity
         (pr1
            ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
              · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
       id_right
         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x))),,
      (λ (x
          x' : coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
       (f : coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)))
         (let X :=
            λ (C : category) (a b : C)
            (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
            pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
          X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            (pr1
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
            (pr2
               ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)
             · pr1
                 ((identity
                     (pr1
                        ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                   id_right
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           x)))
                  · # (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f))
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x'))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x))
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x')))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f)) @
                ! id_left
                    (pr1
                       (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V)
                          f)))
               (pr2
                  (# (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) f
                   · (identity (pr1 ((... · ...) x')),,
                      id_right
                        (pr2
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              x'))))))
            (pr2
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      ((ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)),,
                 id_right
                   (pr2
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V)) x)))
                · # (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))) f)))))
     (unit_ptdob Mon_V) x) =
pr1
  (id2
     (ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V
      · ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V) x)

        apply id_right.

              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))

         (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
               (pr21 x)
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 x)
               (λ p : V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                   pr11 x ⟧)
                  (identity
                     (pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                   · pr12 x) 
                  (pr12 x)
                  (λ p : 
                      V
                      ⟦ 
                      pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                      pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (id_right (pr12 x))
                  (id_left (pr12 x))) 
               (! pr22 x))
            (pr2
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                     x)
                · identity
                    (pr1
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                       x)))))
         (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))))
   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, x': coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
f: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
⟦ x, x' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (identity
           (coslice_cat_total
              (coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))) x))
     (pr2
        ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))) ?p
  (pr2
     (# (identity
           (coslice_cat_total
              (coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) f
      · (identity
           (pr1
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                 x')),,
         total2_paths_f
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧)
              (pr21 x')
              (pr2
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
               · pr12 x')
              (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x'
                     ⟧,
               pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V
                  ⟦ pr1
                      (monoidal_unit
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧)
                 (identity
                    (pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V))) · pr12 x')
                 (pr12 x')
                 (λ p : V
                        ⟦ pr1
                            (monoidal_unit
                               (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                  Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧,
                  pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
                 (id_right (pr12 x'))
                 (id_left (pr12 x'))) (! pr22 x'))
           (let X :=
              λ (C : category) (a b : C)
              (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
              pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
            X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
              (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
              (pr2
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
               · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
              (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
              (transportf
                 (mor_disp
                    (pr2
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)))
                    (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                            · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
                             x')))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x'
                     ⟧) (pr21 x')
                    (pr2
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)) · pr12 x')
                    (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                           pr11 x' ⟧,
                     pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V
                        ⟦ pr1
                            (monoidal_unit
                               (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                  Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧)
                       (identity
                          (pr1
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V))) · pr12 x')
                       (pr12 x')
                       (λ p : V
                              ⟦ pr1
                                  (monoidal_unit
                                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                        Mon_V)),
                              pr11 x' ⟧,
                        pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') =
                        p) (id_right (pr12 x'))
                       (id_left (pr12 x')))
                    (! pr22 x'))
                 (pr2
                    (pr2
                       (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V))) x')
                     · identity
                         (pr1
                            (identity
                               (coslice_cat_total
                                  (coslice_cat_total V
                                     ...)
                                  (monoidal_unit ...))
                               x')))))
              (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))))) =
pr2
  ((identity
      (pr1
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))) x)),,
    total2_paths_f
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 x)
         (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
          pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ pr1
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
             pr11 x ⟧)
            (identity
               (pr1
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
             · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
             pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
            (id_right (pr12 x)) (id_left (pr12 x)))
         (! pr22 x))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) (a b : C)
         (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
         pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
               (pr21 x)
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 x)
               (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                      ⟧,
                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                  (identity
                     (pr1
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V))) · pr12 x)
                  (pr12 x)
                  (λ p : V
                         ⟦ pr1
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (id_right (pr12 x))
                  (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))
            (pr2
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V))) x)
                · identity
                    (pr1
                       (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V))) x)))))
         (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))))
   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)
 apply homset_property.

Mon_V: monoidal V
x, x': coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1
  (# (identity
        (coslice_cat_total
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) f
   · (identity

           (identity
              (coslice_cat_total
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧)
           (pr21 x')
           (pr2
              (monoidal_unit

            · pr12 x')

            pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V
               ⟦ pr1
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
               pr11 x' ⟧)
              (identity
                 (pr1
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               · pr12 x') (pr12 x')
              (λ p : V
                     ⟦ pr1
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧,
               pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
              (id_right (pr12 x')) (id_left (pr12 x')))
           (! pr22 x'))
        (let X :=
           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
           (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
           pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
         X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
           (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
           (pr2
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
           (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
           (transportf
              (mor_disp
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                 (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧)
                 (pr21 x')
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                  · pr12 x')
                 (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        pr11 x' ⟧,
                  pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V
                     ⟦ pr1
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧)
                    (identity
                       (pr1
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V))) · pr12 x')
                    (pr12 x')
                    (λ p : V
                           ⟦ pr1
                               (monoidal_unit
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)), pr11 x'
                           ⟧,
                     pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
                    (id_right (pr12 x'))
                    (id_left (pr12 x'))) (! pr22 x'))
              (pr2
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V))) x')
                  · identity
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total
                               (coslice_cat_total V
                                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                               (monoidal_unit
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V))) x')))))
           (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))))) =
pr1
  ((identity
      (pr1
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit

    total2_paths_f

               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))

                · pr12 x)

                  (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))

Mon_V: monoidal V

            · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V

                 (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V

              (internal_paths_rew_r
