                  · pr12 x')
                 (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        pr11 x' ⟧,
                  pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V
                     ⟦ pr1
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧)
                    (identity
                       (pr1
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V))) · pr12 x')
                    (pr12 x')
                    (λ p : V

                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)), pr11 x'
                           ⟧,

                    (id_left (pr12 x'))) (! pr22 x'))

                          (monoidal_unit

                  · identity

                               (coslice_cat_total V
                                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                               (monoidal_unit

                                     Mon_V))) x')))))
           (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))))) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, x': coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
f: coslice_cat_total

  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
⟦ x, x' ⟧
?b =
pr1
  ((identity
      (pr1
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))) x)),,
    total2_paths_f
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧) 
         (pr21 x)
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 x)
         (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
          pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ pr1
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
             pr11 x ⟧)
            (identity
               (pr1
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
             · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                   pr11 x ⟧,
             pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
            (id_right (pr12 x)) 
            (id_left (pr12 x))) 
         (! pr22 x))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) 
         (a b : C) (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x0 x'0 : x = x'), 
         pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
               (pr21 x)
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 x)
               (λ p : V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                   pr11 x ⟧)
                  (identity
                     (pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                   · pr12 x) 
                  (pr12 x)
                  (λ p : 
                      V
                      ⟦ 
                      pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                      pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (id_right (pr12 x))
                  (id_left (pr12 x))) 
               (! pr22 x))
            (pr2
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                     x)
                · identity
                    (pr1
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                       x)))))
         (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))))
   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, x': coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
f: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1
  (# (identity
        (coslice_cat_total
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) f
   · (identity
        (pr1
           (identity
              (coslice_cat_total
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
              x')),,
      total2_paths_f
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧)
           (pr21 x')
           (pr2
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            · pr12 x')
           (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧,
            pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V
               ⟦ pr1
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
               pr11 x' ⟧)
              (identity
                 (pr1
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               · pr12 x') (pr12 x')
              (λ p : V
                     ⟦ pr1
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧,
               pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
              (id_right (pr12 x')) (id_left (pr12 x')))
           (! pr22 x'))
        (let X :=
           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
           (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
           pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
         X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
           (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
           (pr2
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
           (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
           (transportf
              (mor_disp
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                 (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧)
                 (pr21 x')
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                  · pr12 x')
                 (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        pr11 x' ⟧,
                  pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V
                     ⟦ pr1
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)), pr11 x' ⟧)
                    (identity
                       (pr1
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V))) · pr12 x')
                    (pr12 x')
                    (λ p : V
                           ⟦ pr1
                               (monoidal_unit
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)), pr11 x'
                           ⟧,
                     pr12 x' · identity (pr11 x') = p)
                    (id_right (pr12 x'))
                    (id_left (pr12 x'))) (! pr22 x'))
              (pr2
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V))) x')
                  · identity
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total
                               (coslice_cat_total V
                                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                               (monoidal_unit
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V))) x')))))
           (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))))) =
?b
 apply id_right. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, x': coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
f: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1
  (# (identity
        (coslice_cat_total
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) f) =
pr1
  ((identity
      (pr1
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))) x)),,
    total2_paths_f
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 x)
         (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
          pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ pr1
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
             pr11 x ⟧)
            (identity
               (pr1
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
             · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
             pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
            (id_right (pr12 x)) (id_left (pr12 x)))
         (! pr22 x))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) (a b : C)
         (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
         pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
               (pr21 x)
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 x)
               (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                      ⟧,
                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                  (identity
                     (pr1
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V))) · pr12 x)
                  (pr12 x)
                  (λ p : V
                         ⟦ pr1
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (id_right (pr12 x))
                  (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))
            (pr2
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V))) x)
                · identity
                    (pr1
                       (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V))) x)))))
         (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))))
   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)

        apply (! id_left _).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
vcomp2 (counit_ptdob Mon_V)
  (((λ x : coslice_cat_total
             (coslice_cat_total V
                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
             (monoidal_unit
                (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
     identity
       (pr1
          (identity
             (coslice_cat_total
                (coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                (monoidal_unit
                   (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
             x)),,
     total2_paths_f
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
          (pr2
             (monoidal_unit
                (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
           · pr12 x)
          (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
           pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V
              ⟦ pr1
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
              pr11 x ⟧)
             (identity
                (pr1
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
              · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
             (λ p : V
                    ⟦ pr1
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
              pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
             (id_right (pr12 x)) (id_left (pr12 x)))
          (! pr22 x)
        :
        pr1
          (pr2
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total
                   (coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                x)
           · identity
               (pr1
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V))) x))) =
        pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
               · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
       (let X :=
          λ (C : category) (a b : C)
          (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
          pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
        X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
          (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
          (pr2
             (monoidal_unit
                (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
           · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
          (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
          (transportf
             (mor_disp
                (pr2
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                (pr21 x)
                (pr2
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                 · pr12 x)
                (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                       ⟧,
                 pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (V
                    ⟦ pr1
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                   (identity (pr1 (monoidal_unit ...))
                    · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
                   (λ p : V ⟦ pr1 (monoidal_unit ...),
                          pr11 x ⟧,
                    pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                   (id_right (pr12 x))
                   (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x)
              :
              pr1
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total (...) (...))
                      x)
                 · identity (pr1 (identity (...) x))) =
              pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
             (pr2
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total
                         (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                         (monoidal_unit (...))) x)
                 · identity
                     (pr1
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total (...)
                              (...)) x)))))
          (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))))
    :
    nat_trans_data
      (identity
         (coslice_cat_total
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
      (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)),,
   ((λ (x
        x' : coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
     (f : coslice_cat_total
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)) ⟦ x,
          x' ⟧),
     total2_paths_f
       (id_right
          (pr1
             (# (identity
                   (coslice_cat_total
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                      (monoidal_unit
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)))) f)) @
        ! id_left
            (pr1
               (# (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)))) f)))
       (let X :=
          λ (C : category) (a b : C)
          (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
          pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
        X (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
          (monoidal_unit
             (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          (pr1
             ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
               · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
          (pr2
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total
                   (coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                x)
           · pr1
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total (...)
                            (...)) x)),,
                 total2_paths_f
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                       ⟧) (pr21 x)
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                       · pr12 x)
                      (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                             pr11 x ⟧,
                       pr12 x · identity ... = p)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                         (identity ... · pr12 x)
                         (pr12 x) (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                         (id_right (pr12 x))
                         (id_left (pr12 x)))
                      (! pr22 x))
                   (let X0 :=
                      λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                      (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                      (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                      pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                    X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                      (pr11 ((...) x))
                      (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x))
                      (pr21 ((...) x))
                      (transportf (mor_disp ... ...)
                         (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                            ... ... ... ...) (pr2 ...))
                      (pr22 ((...) x))))
                · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
          (pr2
             ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
               · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
          (transportf
             (mor_disp
                (pr2
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V))) x))
                (pr2
                   ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
             (id_right
                (pr1
                   (# (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            (monoidal_unit ...))) f)) @
              ! id_left
                  (pr1
                     (# (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              (monoidal_unit ...))) f)))
             (pr2
                (# (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)))) f
                 · (identity
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total ... ...)
                            x')),,
                    total2_paths_f
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                          pr11 x' ⟧) (pr21 x')
                         (pr2 (...) · pr12 x')
                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧,
                          pr12 x' · ... = p)
                         (internal_paths_rew_r
                            (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                            (... · pr12 x') (pr12 x')
                            (λ ..., ...)
                            (id_right ...)
                            (id_left ...)) (! pr22 x'))
                      (let X0 :=
                         λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                         (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                         (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                         pr1 (...) in
                       X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                         (pr11 (... x'))
                         (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                         (pr21 (... x'))
                         (transportf (...) (...) (...))
                         (pr22 (... x')))))))
          (pr2
             ((identity
                 (pr1
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                          (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                          (monoidal_unit ...)) x)),,
               total2_paths_f
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                    (pr21 x)
                    (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                     · pr12 x)
                    (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                           pr11 x ⟧,
                     pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧)
                       (identity (...) · pr12 x)
                       (pr12 x)
                       (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                        pr12 x · ... = p)
                       (id_right (pr12 x))
                       (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))
                 (let X0 :=
                    λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                    (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                    (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                    pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                  X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                    (pr11 ((... · ...) x))
                    (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                     · pr12 ((...) x))
                    (pr21 ((... · ...) x))
                    (transportf
                       (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                          (pr21 x) (...) (...) (...)
                          (! pr22 x)) (pr2 (...)))
                    (pr22 ((... · ...) x))))
              · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))))
    :
    (λ t : nat_trans_data
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total
                   (coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
             (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
              · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V),
     is_nat_trans
       (identity
          (coslice_cat_total
             (coslice_cat_total V
                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
             (monoidal_unit
                (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
       (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) t)
      ((λ x : coslice_cat_total
                (coslice_cat_total V
                   (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                (monoidal_unit
                   (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
        identity
          (pr1
             (identity
                (coslice_cat_total
                   (coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                x)),,
        total2_paths_f
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
             (pr21 x)
             (pr2
                (monoidal_unit
                   (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
              · pr12 x)
             (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
              pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V
                 ⟦ pr1
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                (identity
                   (pr1
                      (monoidal_unit
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V))) · pr12 x)
                (pr12 x)
                (λ p : V
                       ⟦ pr1
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
                 pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                (id_right (pr12 x)) (id_left (pr12 x)))
             (! pr22 x)
           :
           pr1
             (pr2
                (identity
                   (coslice_cat_total
                      (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                      (monoidal_unit (...))) x)
              · identity
                  (pr1
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total (...) (...))
                        x))) =
           pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
          (let X :=
             λ (C : category) (a b : C)
             (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
             pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
           X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
             (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
             (pr2
                (monoidal_unit
                   (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
              · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
             (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
             (transportf
                (mor_disp
                   (pr2
                      (monoidal_unit
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)))
                   (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
                            x)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                   (pr21 x)
                   (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...)) · pr12 x)
                   (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                          pr11 x ⟧,
                    pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧)
                      (identity (...) · pr12 x)
                      (pr12 x)
                      (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                       pr12 x · ... = p)
                      (id_right (pr12 x))
                      (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x)
                 :
                 pr1
                   (pr2 (identity ... x)
                    · identity (pr1 ...)) =
                 pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
                (pr2
                   (pr2
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total ... ...) x)
                    · identity (pr1 (identity ... x)))))
             (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
         (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)))) =
id2
  (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
has_homsets
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

∏

      (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))

vcomp2 (counit_ptdob Mon_V)
  ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total
             (coslice_cat_total V
                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
             (monoidal_unit
                (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
    identity
      (pr1

            (coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧)

                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
             · pr12 x0) 
            (pr12 x0)
            (λ p : V

                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),

            (id_right (pr12 x0)) 
            (id_left (pr12 x0)))

      (let X :=
         λ (C : category)

         (x2 x'0 : x1 = x'), 
         pr1 (C a b x1 x' x2 x'0) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)

                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
         (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

            (internal_paths_rew_r

               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 x0)

               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),

                  (identity
                     (pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                   · pr12 x0) 
                  (pr12 x0)
                  (λ p : 
                      V
                      ⟦ 
                      pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                      pr11 x0 ⟧,

                     x0)
                · identity
                    (pr1
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                       (monoidal_unit ...)) x0)))))
         (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0)))),,
   (λ (x0
       x' : coslice_cat_total
              (coslice_cat_total V

                    (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))

         (monoidal_unit
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

            ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
              · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))

                  (coslice_cat_total V

                       (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                       (monoidal_unit ...)) x0)),,

                     (V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧)
                     (pr21 x0)
                     (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                      · pr12 x0)

                      p :

                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x0 ⟧)
                       (identity (...) · pr12 x0)
                       (pr12 x0)
                       (λ 
                       p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x0 ⟧,
                       pr12 x0 · ... = p)
                       (id_right (pr12 x0))
                       (id_left (pr12 x0)))
                     (! pr22 x0))
                  (let X0 :=
                     λ (C : category) 
                     (a b : C) 
                     (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                     pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
                   X0 V 
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                     (pr11 ((... · ...) x0))
                     (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                      · pr12 
                      ((...) x0))
                     (pr21 ((... · ...) x0))
                     (transportf
                       (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r 
                       (...) 
                       (pr21 x0) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (! pr22 x0)) 
                       (pr2 (...)))
                     (pr22 ((... · ...) x0))))
               · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
         (pr2
            ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
              · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                     x0))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                       (monoidal_unit (...)))) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                       (monoidal_unit (...)))) f)))
            (pr2
               (# (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
                  f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total (...) (...))
                       x')),,
                   total2_paths_f
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧)
                       (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                       · pr12 x')
                       (λ 
                       p : 
                       V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧,
                       pr12 x' · identity ... = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                       (identity ... · pr12 x')
                       (pr12 x') 
                       (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                       (id_right (pr12 x'))
                       (id_left (pr12 x')))
                       (! pr22 x'))
                     (let X0 :=
                       λ 
                       (C : category) 
                       (a b : C) 
                       (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                       pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
                      X0 V 
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                       (pr11 ((...) x'))
                       (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x'))
                       (pr21 ((...) x'))
                       (transportf 
                       (mor_disp ... ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                       ... ... ... ...) 
                       (pr2 ...)) 
                       (pr22 ((...) x')))))))
         (pr2
            ((identity
                (pr1
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                       (monoidal_unit (...))) x0)),,
              total2_paths_f
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧)
                   (pr21 x0)
                   (pr2
                      (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                    · pr12 x0)
                   (λ p : 
                       V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧,
                    pr12 x0 · identity (pr11 x0) = p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ 
                       pr1 (monoidal_unit ...),
                       pr11 x0 ⟧)
                      (identity (pr1 ...) · pr12 x0)
                      (pr12 x0)
                      (λ 
                       p : V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x0 ⟧,

                      (id_right (pr12 x0))
                      (id_left (pr12 x0)))

                (let X0 :=

                   (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),

                 X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                   (pr11 
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
                   (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                    · pr12 
                    ((... · ...) x0))
                   (pr21 
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
                   (transportf
                      (mor_disp (pr2 ...) (pr21 (...)))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x0 ⟧) 
                       (pr21 x0) 
                       (... · pr12 x0) 
                       (λ ..., ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                       ... ... ... ...) 
                       (! pr22 x0)) 
                      (pr2 (... · ...)))
                   (pr22 
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))))
             · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))))) x =
id2
  (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
  x

Mon_V: monoidal V

  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
 apply homset_property.

         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               x0)
          · pr1
              ((identity
                  (pr1
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                           (monoidal_unit ...)) x0)),,
                total2_paths_f
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0
                      ⟧) (pr21 x0)
                     (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                      · pr12 x0)

                            pr11 x0 ⟧,

                        (pr12 x0)

                        (id_right (pr12 x0))

                      · pr12 ((...) x0))

                        (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))

                           (pr12 x')
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)

                           (id_left (pr12 x')))

                          (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total (...)
                                (...)) x)))))
            (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))),,
      (λ (x
          x' : coslice_cat_total
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
       (f : coslice_cat_total
              (coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)))) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)))) f)))
         (let X :=
            λ (C : category) (a b : C)
            (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
            pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
          X
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            (pr1
               ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V))) x)
             · pr1
                 ((identity
                     (pr1
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total (...)
                              (...)) x)),,
                   total2_paths_f
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                         pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
                        (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                         · pr12 x)
                        (λ p : V
                               ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                               pr11 x ⟧,
                         pr12 x · identity ... = p)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                           (identity ... · pr12 x)
                           (pr12 x)
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                           (id_right (pr12 x))
                           (id_left (pr12 x)))
                        (! pr22 x))
                     (let X0 :=
                        λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                        (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                        (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                        pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                      X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        (pr11 ((...) x))
                        (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x))
                        (pr21 ((...) x))
                        (transportf (mor_disp ... ...)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                              ... ... ... ... ...)
                           (pr2 ...)) (pr22 ((...) x))))
                  · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
            (pr2
               ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V))) x))
                  (pr2
                     ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (# (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              (monoidal_unit ...))) f)) @
                ! id_left
                    (pr1
                       (# (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   ...)
                                (monoidal_unit ...)))
                          f)))
               (pr2
                  (# (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)))) f
                   · (identity
                        (pr1
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total ...
                                 ...) x')),,
                      total2_paths_f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                            pr11 x' ⟧) (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 (...) · pr12 x')
                           (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧,
                            pr12 x' · ... = p)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                              (... · pr12 x')
                              (pr12 x') (λ ..., ...)
                              (id_right ...)
                              (id_left ...))
                           (! pr22 x'))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                           pr1 (...) in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr11 (... x'))
                           (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                           (pr21 (... x'))
                           (transportf (...) (...)
                              (...)) (pr22 (... x')))))))
            (pr2
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            (monoidal_unit ...)) x)),,
                 total2_paths_f
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                       ⟧) (pr21 x)
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                       · pr12 x)
                      (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                             pr11 x ⟧,
                       pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧)
                         (identity (...) · pr12 x)
                         (pr12 x)
                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                          pr12 x · ... = p)
                         (id_right (pr12 x))
                         (id_left (pr12 x)))
                      (! pr22 x))
                   (let X0 :=
                      λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                      (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                      (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                      pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                    X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                      (pr11 ((... · ...) x))
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                       · pr12 ((...) x))
                      (pr21 ((... · ...) x))
                      (transportf
                         (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                         (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                            (pr21 x) (...) (...) (...)
                            (! pr22 x)) (pr2 (...)))
                      (pr22 ((... · ...) x))))
                · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
     x) =
pr1
  (id2
     (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
     (pr2
        ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (vcomp2 (counit_ptdob Mon_V)
        ((λ x : coslice_cat_total
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
          identity
            (pr1
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                     (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                  x)),,
          total2_paths_f
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
               (pr21 x)
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 x)
               (λ p : V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                   pr11 x ⟧)
                  (identity
                     (pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                   · pr12 x) 
                  (pr12 x)
                  (λ p : 
                      V
                      ⟦ 
                      pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                      pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (id_right (pr12 x))
                  (id_left (pr12 x))) 
               (! pr22 x))
            (let X :=
               λ (C : category) 
               (a b : C) 
               (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
               pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
             X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
               (transportf
                  (mor_disp
                     (pr2
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                     (pr21 
                      ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                     (pr21 x)
                     (pr2
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                      · pr12 x)
                     (λ 
                      p : 
                       V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
                      pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ 
                       pr1 (monoidal_unit (...)),
                       pr11 x ⟧)
                       (identity (pr1 (...)) · pr12 x)
                       (pr12 x)
                       (λ 
                       p : V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧,
                       pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                       (id_right (pr12 x))
                       (id_left (pr12 x))) 
                     (! pr22 x))
                  (pr2
                     (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total (...) (...))
                       x)
                      · 
                      identity
                       (pr1 (identity (...) x)))))
               (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))),,
         (λ (x
             x' : coslice_cat_total
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
          (f : coslice_cat_total
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
               ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
          total2_paths_f
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))

                       (coslice_cat_total V

                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))

                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
               (pr1
                  ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
               (pr2

                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                     x)
                · pr1
                    ((identity
                       (pr1 (identity (...) x)),,
                      total2_paths_f
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                       (pr21 x) 
                       (pr2 ... · pr12 x)
                       (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (pr12 x) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...)) 
                       (! pr22 x))
                       (let X0 :=
                       λ 
                       (C : category) 
                       (a b : C) 
                       (x0 x'0 : ...) 
                       (x1 x'1 : ...), 
                       pr1 ... in
                       X0 V 
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                       (pr11 (...)) 
                       (... · pr12 ...) 
                       (pr21 (...))
                       (transportf ... ... ...)
                       (pr22 (...))))
                     · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
               (transportf
                  (mor_disp
                     (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                       (monoidal_unit (...))) x))
                     (pr2
                       ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
                  (id_right
                     (pr1
                       (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total ... ...)) f)) @
                   ! id_left
                       (pr1
                       (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total ... ...)) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                       (monoidal_unit ...))) f
                      · 
                      (identity
                       (pr1 (identity ... x')),,
                       total2_paths_f
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧) 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (... · pr12 x') 
                       (λ ..., ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                       ... ... ... ...) 
                       (! pr22 x'))
                       (let X0 :=
                       λ ... ... ... ..., ... in
                       X0 V 
                       (...) 
                       (pr11 ...) 
                       (...) 
                       (pr21 ...) 
                       (...) 
                       (pr22 ...))))))
               (pr2
                  ((identity
                      (pr1
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total ... ...) x)),,
                    total2_paths_f
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                       (pr21 x) 
                       (pr2 (...) · pr12 x)
                       (λ 
                       p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                       pr12 x · ... = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                       (... · pr12 x) 
                       (pr12 x) 
                       (λ ..., ...) 
                       (id_right ...) 
                       (id_left ...)) 
                       (! pr22 x))
                      (let X0 :=
                       λ 
                       (C : category) 
                       (a b : C) 
                       (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0), 
                       pr1 (...) in
                       X0 V 
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                       (pr11 (... x))
                       (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                       (pr21 (... x))
                       (transportf (...) (...) (...))
                       (pr22 (... x))))
                   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
        x)) =
pr2
  (id2
     (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
     (pr2
        ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))) ?p
  (pr2
     (vcomp2 (counit_ptdob Mon_V)
        ((λ x : coslice_cat_total
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
          identity
            (pr1
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V))) x)),,
          total2_paths_f
            (internal_paths_rew_r

               (pr21 x)
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit

                · pr12 x)
               (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x

                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                  (identity
                     (pr1
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V))) · pr12 x)
                  (pr12 x)
                  (λ p : V
                         ⟦ pr1
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (id_right (pr12 x))
                  (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))
            (let X :=
               λ (C : category) (a b : C)
               (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
               pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
             X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
               (transportf

                           (monoidal_pointed_objects

                              x)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                      ⟧) (pr21 x)
                     (pr2
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)) · pr12 x)
                     (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                            pr11 x ⟧,
                      pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (V
                         ⟦ pr1 (monoidal_unit (...)),
                         pr11 x ⟧)
                        (identity (pr1 (...)) · pr12 x)
                        (pr12 x)
                        (λ p : V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧,
                         pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) =
                         p) (id_right (pr12 x))
                        (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))
                  (pr2
                     (pr2
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total (...)
                              (...)) x)
                      · identity
                          (pr1 (identity (...) x)))))
               (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))),,
         (λ (x
             x' : coslice_cat_total
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

                 (coslice_cat_total V

                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
               ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)))) f)) @

            (let X :=

               (pr1

               (pr2

                           (pr2 ... · pr12 x)
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                              (...) (pr12 x) (...)
                              (...) (...)) (! pr22 x))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x0 x'0 : ...)
                           (x1 x'1 : ...), pr1 ... in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr11 (...))
                           (... · pr12 ...)
                           (pr21 (...))

                           (pr22 (...))))

               (pr2

                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
               (transportf

                              (coslice_cat_total V

                              (monoidal_unit (...))) x))
                     (pr2
                        ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V

                           x')))
                  (id_right
                     (pr1
                        (# (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total ...
                                 ...)) f)) @
                   ! id_left
                       (pr1
                          (# (identity
                                (coslice_cat_total ...
                                   ...)) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              (monoidal_unit ...))) f
                      · (identity
                           (pr1 (identity ... x')),,
                         total2_paths_f
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                              (pr21 x')
                              (... · pr12 x')
                              (λ ..., ...)
                              (internal_paths_rew_r
                                 ... ... ... ... ...
                                 ...) (! pr22 x'))
                           (let X0 :=
                              λ ... ... ... ..., ...
                              in
                            X0 V (...) (pr11 ...)
                              (...) (pr21 ...) (...)
                              (pr22 ...))))))
               (pr2
                  ((identity
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total ... ...)
                            x)),,
                    total2_paths_f
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                          pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 (...) · pr12 x)
                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                          pr12 x · ... = p)
                         (internal_paths_rew_r
                            (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                            (... · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
                            (λ ..., ...)
                            (id_right ...)
                            (id_left ...)) (! pr22 x))
                      (let X0 :=
                         λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                         (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                         (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                         pr1 (...) in
                       X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                         (pr11 (... x))
                         (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                         (pr21 (... x))
                         (transportf (...) (...) (...))
                         (pr22 (... x))))
                   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
        x)) =
pr2
  (id2
     (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
pr1
  (vcomp2 (counit_ptdob Mon_V)
     ((λ x : coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
       identity
         (pr1
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               x)),,
       total2_paths_f
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
            (pr21 x)
            (pr2
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
             · pr12 x)
            (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
             pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V
                ⟦ pr1
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                pr11 x ⟧)
               (identity
                  (pr1
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V))) · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
               (λ p : V
                      ⟦ pr1
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (id_right (pr12 x)) (id_left (pr12 x)))
            (! pr22 x))
         (let X :=
            λ (C : category) (a b : C)
            (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
            pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
          X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
            (pr2
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
             · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
            (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)))
                  (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                  (pr21 x)
                  (pr2
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)) · pr12 x)
                  (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                         pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V
                      ⟦ pr1
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                     (identity
                        (pr1 (monoidal_unit (...)))
                      · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
                     (λ p : V
                            ⟦ pr1
                                (monoidal_unit (...)),
                            pr11 x ⟧,
                      pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                     (id_right (pr12 x))
                     (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))
               (pr2
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           (monoidal_unit (...))) x)
                   · identity
                       (pr1
                          (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total (...)
                                (...)) x)))))
            (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))),,

          x' : coslice_cat_total
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))

              (coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

            (pr1
               (# (identity

                        (coslice_cat_total V

                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)))) f)) @

              (pr1
                 (# (identity

                          (coslice_cat_total V

                          (monoidal_unit

                                Mon_V)))) f)))

            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            (monoidal_unit

            (pr1

            (pr2

                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects

                              (...)) x)),,

                        (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                         · pr12 x)
                        (λ p : V
                               ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,

                         pr12 x · identity ... = p)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                           (identity ... · pr12 x)
                           (pr12 x)
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                           (id_right (pr12 x))
                           (id_left (pr12 x)))
                        (! pr22 x))
                     (let X0 :=

                        (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                        pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                      X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        (pr11 ((...) x))
                        (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x))
                        (pr21 ((...) x))
                        (transportf (mor_disp ... ...)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                              ... ... ... ... ...)
                           (pr2 ...)) (pr22 ((...) x))))
                  · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
            (pr2
               ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     (identity

                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit

                                 Mon_V))) x))
                  (pr2

                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
