                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              (monoidal_unit ...))) f)) @
                ! id_left
                    (pr1
                       (# (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   ...)
                                (monoidal_unit ...)))
                          f)))
               (pr2
                  (# (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)))) f
                   · (identity
                        (pr1
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total ...
                                 ...) x')),,
                      total2_paths_f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                            pr11 x' ⟧) (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 (...) · pr12 x')
                           (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧,
                            pr12 x' · ... = p)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                              (... · pr12 x')
                              (pr12 x') (λ ..., ...)
                              (id_right ...)
                              (id_left ...))
                           (! pr22 x'))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                           pr1 (...) in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr11 (... x'))
                           (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                           (pr21 (... x'))
                           (transportf (...) (...)
                              (...)) (pr22 (... x')))))))
            (pr2
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            (monoidal_unit ...)) x)),,
                 total2_paths_f
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                       ⟧) (pr21 x)
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                       · pr12 x)
                      (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                             pr11 x ⟧,

                         (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧)

                         (pr12 x)
                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                          pr12 x · ... = p)
                         (id_right (pr12 x))
                         (id_left (pr12 x)))

                   (let X0 :=
                      λ (C : category) (a b : C)

                      (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                      pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                    X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                      (pr11 ((... · ...) x))
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                       · pr12 ((...) x))
                      (pr21 ((... · ...) x))
                      (transportf
                         (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                         (internal_paths_rew_r (...)

                      (pr22 ((... · ...) x))))
                · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
     x) =
pr1
  (id2
     (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)

        apply id_right.

Mon_V: monoidal V
(λ _ : vcomp2 (counit_ptdob Mon_V)
         (((λ x : coslice_cat_total
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit

            identity

                 (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V))) x)),,
            total2_paths_f
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                 (pr21 x)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                  · pr12 x)
                 (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        pr11 x ⟧,
                  pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V
                     ⟦ pr1
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                    (identity
                       (pr1 (monoidal_unit (...)))
                     · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
                    (λ p : V
                           ⟦ pr1 (monoidal_unit (...)),
                           pr11 x ⟧,
                     pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                    (id_right (pr12 x))
                    (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x)
               :
               pr1
                 (pr2
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                          (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                          (monoidal_unit ...)) x)
                  · identity
                      (pr1
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total ... ...)
                            x))) =
               pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
              (let X :=
                 λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                 (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                 (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
                 pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
               X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                 (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                  · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
                            x))
                 (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                         · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
                 (transportf

                       (pr2
                          (monoidal_unit

                                Mon_V)))
                       (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                               · ptdob_to_ptdptdob
                                   Mon_V) x)))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
                       (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                        · pr12 x)
                       (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                              pr11 x ⟧,
                        pr12 x · identity ... = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                          (identity ... · pr12 x)
                          (pr12 x)
                          (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                          (id_right (pr12 x))
                          (id_left (pr12 x)))
                       (! pr22 x)
                     :

                            · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)

                    (pr2

                         · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))))

                   (monoidal_unit

             (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V

                                ...)) f
                        · (identity (pr1 ...),,

                                ... ... ... ... ...)
                             (... ...)))))
                 (pr2
                    ((identity (pr1 (identity ... x)),,

                           (pr21 x) (... · pr12 x)

                           (internal_paths_rew_r ...

                           (! pr22 x))

                          (monoidal_unit

                                Mon_V))))

                    (monoidal_unit

                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)),

                    (identity

                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V))) x)),,
               total2_paths_f
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                    (pr21 x)
                    (pr2

                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)) · pr12 x)
                    (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,

                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ pr1 (monoidal_unit ...),
                        pr11 x ⟧)
                       (identity (pr1 ...) · pr12 x)
                       (pr12 x)

                       (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x)

                             Mon_V))

                          (pr21 (... x)))

                          (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
                          (... · pr12 x) (λ ..., ...)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                             ... ... ... ... ...)
                          (! pr22 x)
                        :
                        pr1 (...) = pr12 (... x))
                       (pr2 (pr2 ... · identity ...)))

              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
           (pr1
              ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
           (pr2
              ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)
            · pr1
                (id2
                   (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
           (pr2
              ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
           (transportf
              (mor_disp
                 (pr2
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
                 (pr2
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
              (id_right
                 (pr1
                    (id2
                       (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
              (pr2
                 (vcomp2 (counit_ptdob Mon_V)
                    ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total
                               (coslice_cat_total V
                                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                               (monoidal_unit
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)),
                      identity
                        (pr1
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total ...
                                 ...) x0)),,
                      total2_paths_f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                            pr11 x0 ⟧) (pr21 x0)
                           (pr2 (...) · pr12 x0)
                           (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x0 ⟧,
                            pr12 x0 · ... = p)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x0 ⟧)
                              (... · pr12 x0)
                              (pr12 x0) (λ ..., ...)
                              (id_right ...)
                              (id_left ...))
                           (! pr22 x0))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x1 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (x2 x'0 : x1 = x'),
                           pr1 (...) in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr11 (... x0))
                           (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                           (pr21 (... x0))
                           (transportf (...) (...)
                              (...)) (pr22 (... x0)))),,
                     (λ (x0
                         x' : coslice_cat_total
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   (monoidal_unit
                                      Mon_V))
                                (monoidal_unit
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)))
                      (f : coslice_cat_total
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)) ⟦ x0, x' ⟧),
                      total2_paths_f
                        (id_right (pr1 (# ... f)) @
                         ! id_left (pr1 (# ... f)))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                           pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1)
                           in
                         X0
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V))
                           (pr1 (... x'))
                           (pr2 (...) · pr1 (...))
                           (pr2 (... x'))
                           (transportf
                              (mor_disp ... ...)
                              (... @ ! ...) (pr2 ...))
                           (pr2 (... · ...))))) x)))
           (pr2
              (id2
                 (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
has_homsets
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∏
x : coslice_cat_total
      (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
      (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
vcomp2
  ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total
             (coslice_cat_total V
                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
             (monoidal_unit
                (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
    identity
      (pr1
         (identity
            (coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
            x0)),,
    total2_paths_f
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧)
         (pr21 x0)
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 x0)
         (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧,
          pr12 x0 · identity (pr11 x0) = p)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ pr1
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
             pr11 x0 ⟧)
            (identity
               (pr1
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
             · pr12 x0) 
            (pr12 x0)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                   pr11 x0 ⟧,
             pr12 x0 · identity (pr11 x0) = p)
            (id_right (pr12 x0)) 
            (id_left (pr12 x0))) 
         (! pr22 x0))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) 
         (a b : C) (x1 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x2 x'0 : x1 = x'), 
         pr1 (C a b x1 x' x2 x'0) in
       X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
         (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
         (pr2
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
          · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                   · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
         (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0)))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧)
               (pr21 x0)
               (pr2
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                · pr12 x0)
               (λ p : V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧,
                pr12 x0 · identity (pr11 x0) = p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                   pr11 x0 ⟧)
                  (identity
                     (pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                   · pr12 x0) 
                  (pr12 x0)
                  (λ p : 
                      V
                      ⟦ 
                      pr1
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                      pr11 x0 ⟧,
                   pr12 x0 · identity (pr11 x0) = p)
                  (id_right (pr12 x0))
                  (id_left (pr12 x0))) 
               (! pr22 x0))
            (pr2
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                     x0)
                · identity
                    (pr1
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                       (monoidal_unit ...)) x0)))))
         (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0)))),,
   (λ (x0
       x' : coslice_cat_total
              (coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
    (f : coslice_cat_total
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)) ⟦ x0,
         x' ⟧),
    total2_paths_f
      (id_right
         (pr1
            (# (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                     (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
               f)) @
       ! id_left
           (pr1
              (# (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
                 f)))
      (let X :=
         λ (C : category) 
         (a b : C) (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
         pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
       X (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
         (monoidal_unit
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
         (pr1
            ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
              · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
         (pr2
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               x0)
          · pr1
              ((identity
                  (pr1
                     (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                       (monoidal_unit ...)) x0)),,
                total2_paths_f
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧)
                     (pr21 x0)
                     (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                      · pr12 x0)
                     (λ 
                      p : 
                       V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧,
                      pr12 x0 · identity (pr11 x0) = p)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x0 ⟧)
                       (identity (...) · pr12 x0)
                       (pr12 x0)
                       (λ 
                       p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x0 ⟧,
                       pr12 x0 · ... = p)
                       (id_right (pr12 x0))
                       (id_left (pr12 x0)))
                     (! pr22 x0))
                  (let X0 :=
                     λ (C : category) 
                     (a b : C) 
                     (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                     (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                     pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
                   X0 V 
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                     (pr11 ((... · ...) x0))
                     (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                      · pr12 
                      ((...) x0))
                     (pr21 ((... · ...) x0))
                     (transportf
                       (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r 
                       (...) 
                       (pr21 x0) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (! pr22 x0)) 
                       (pr2 (...)))
                     (pr22 ((... · ...) x0))))
               · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
         (pr2
            ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
              · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                     x0))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                       (monoidal_unit (...)))) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                       (monoidal_unit (...)))) f)))
            (pr2
               (# (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
                  f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total (...) (...))
                       x')),,
                   total2_paths_f
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧)
                       (pr21 x')
                       (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                       · pr12 x')
                       (λ 
                       p : 
                       V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x' ⟧,
                       pr12 x' · identity ... = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                       (identity ... · pr12 x')
                       (pr12 x') 
                       (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                       (id_right (pr12 x'))
                       (id_left (pr12 x')))
                       (! pr22 x'))
                     (let X0 :=
                       λ 
                       (C : category) 
                       (a b : C) 
                       (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                       pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
                      X0 V 
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                       (pr11 ((...) x'))
                       (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x'))
                       (pr21 ((...) x'))
                       (transportf 
                       (mor_disp ... ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                       ... ... ... ...) 
                       (pr2 ...)) 
                       (pr22 ((...) x')))))))
         (pr2
            ((identity
                (pr1
                   (identity
                      (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                       (monoidal_unit (...))) x0)),,
              total2_paths_f
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧)
                   (pr21 x0)
                   (pr2
                      (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                    · pr12 x0)
                   (λ p : 
                       V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x0 ⟧,
                    pr12 x0 · identity (pr11 x0) = p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ 
                       pr1 (monoidal_unit ...),
                       pr11 x0 ⟧)
                      (identity (pr1 ...) · pr12 x0)
                      (pr12 x0)
                      (λ 
                       p : V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x0 ⟧,
                       pr12 x0 · identity ... = p)
                      (id_right (pr12 x0))
                      (id_left (pr12 x0))) 
                   (! pr22 x0))
                (let X0 :=
                   λ (C : category) 
                   (a b : C) 
                   (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                   pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
                 X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                   (pr11 
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
                   (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                    · pr12 
                    ((... · ...) x0))
                   (pr21 
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))
                   (transportf
                      (mor_disp (pr2 ...) (pr21 (...)))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x0 ⟧) 
                       (pr21 x0) 
                       (... · pr12 x0) 
                       (λ ..., ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                       ... ... ... ...) 
                       (! pr22 x0)) 
                      (pr2 (... · ...)))
                   (pr22 
                    ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · 
                      ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x0))))
             · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                  · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
  (counit_ptdob Mon_V) x =
id2
  (identity
     (coslice_cat_total
        (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
        (monoidal_unit
           (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) x

  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
 apply homset_property.

                     (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                      · pr12 ((...) x0))
                     (pr21 ((... · ...) x0))
                     (transportf
                        (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                        (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                           (pr21 x0) (...) (...) (...)
                           (! pr22 x0)) (pr2 (...)))
                     (pr22 ((... · ...) x0))))
               · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
         (pr2
            ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
              · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
         (transportf
            (mor_disp
               (pr2
                  (identity
                     (coslice_cat_total
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V))) x0))
               (pr2
                  ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
            (id_right
               (pr1
                  (# (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           (monoidal_unit (...)))) f)) @
             ! id_left
                 (pr1
                    (# (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (...))
                             (monoidal_unit (...)))) f)))
            (pr2

                     (coslice_cat_total
                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)))) f
                · (identity
                     (pr1
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total (...)
                              (...)) x')),,
                   total2_paths_f
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                         pr11 x' ⟧) (pr21 x')
                        (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                         · pr12 x')
                        (λ p : V
                               ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                               pr11 x' ⟧,
                         pr12 x' · identity ... = p)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                           (identity ... · pr12 x')
                           (pr12 x')
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                           (id_right (pr12 x'))
                           (id_left (pr12 x')))
                        (! pr22 x'))
                     (let X0 :=
                        λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                        (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                        (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                        pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
                      X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)

                        (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x'))
                        (pr21 ((...) x'))

                           (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                              ... ... ... ... ...)
                           (pr2 ...))
                        (pr22 ((...) x')))))))

            ((identity

                   (pr21 x0)

                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)) · pr12 x0)
                   (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                          pr11 x0 ⟧,

                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ pr1 (monoidal_unit ...),
                       pr11 x0 ⟧)
                      (identity (pr1 ...) · pr12 x0)
                      (pr12 x0)
                      (λ p : V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x0 ⟧,
                       pr12 x0 · identity ... = p)
                      (id_right (pr12 x0))
                      (id_left (pr12 x0))) (! pr22 x0))
                (let X0 :=
                   λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                   (x1 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (x2 x'1 : x1 = x'0),
                   pr1 (C a b x1 x'0 x2 x'1) in
                 X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                   (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
                            x0))
                   (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                    · pr12 ((... · ...) x0))
                   (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                           · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V)
                            x0))

                         (λ ..., ...)
                         (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...

                         (! pr22 x0))
                      (pr2 (... · ...)))

  (counit_ptdob Mon_V) x =

          X
            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            (pr1
               ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V))) x)
             · pr1
                 ((identity
                     (pr1
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total (...)
                              (...)) x)),,
                   total2_paths_f
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                         pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
                        (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                         · pr12 x)
                        (λ p : V
                               ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                               pr11 x ⟧,
                         pr12 x · identity ... = p)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                           (identity ... · pr12 x)
                           (pr12 x)
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                           (id_right (pr12 x))
                           (id_left (pr12 x)))
                        (! pr22 x))
                     (let X0 :=
                        λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                        (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                        (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                        pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                      X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        (pr11 ((...) x))
                        (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x))
                        (pr21 ((...) x))
                        (transportf (mor_disp ... ...)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                              ... ... ... ... ...)
                           (pr2 ...)) (pr22 ((...) x))))
                  · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
            (pr2
               ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V))) x))
                  (pr2
                     ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (# (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              (monoidal_unit ...))) f)) @
                ! id_left
                    (pr1
                       (# (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   ...)
                                (monoidal_unit ...)))
                          f)))
               (pr2
                  (# (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)))) f
                   · (identity
                        (pr1
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total ...
                                 ...) x')),,
                      total2_paths_f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                            pr11 x' ⟧) (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 (...) · pr12 x')
                           (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧,
                            pr12 x' · ... = p)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                              (... · pr12 x')
                              (pr12 x') (λ ..., ...)
                              (id_right ...)
                              (id_left ...))
                           (! pr22 x'))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                           pr1 (...) in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr11 (... x'))
                           (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                           (pr21 (... x'))
                           (transportf (...) (...)
                              (...)) (pr22 (... x')))))))
            (pr2
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            (monoidal_unit ...)) x)),,
                 total2_paths_f
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                       ⟧) (pr21 x)
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                       · pr12 x)
                      (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                             pr11 x ⟧,
                       pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧)
                         (identity (...) · pr12 x)
                         (pr12 x)
                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                          pr12 x · ... = p)
                         (id_right (pr12 x))
                         (id_left (pr12 x)))
                      (! pr22 x))
                   (let X0 :=
                      λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                      (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                      (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                      pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                    X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                      (pr11 ((... · ...) x))
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                       · pr12 ((...) x))
                      (pr21 ((... · ...) x))
                      (transportf
                         (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                         (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                            (pr21 x) (...) (...) (...)
                            (! pr22 x)) (pr2 (...)))
                      (pr22 ((... · ...) x))))
                · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
     (counit_ptdob Mon_V) x) =
pr1
  (id2
     (identity
        (coslice_cat_total
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

     (pr2

              (coslice_cat_total V

              (monoidal_unit

  ?p

                  (coslice_cat_total V

               (pr21 x)

                · pr12 x)
               (λ p : V ⟦ 
                      monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,

                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1

                   pr11 x ⟧)

                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
                   · pr12 x)

                  (λ p : 
                      V

                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),
                      pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)

                  (id_left (pr12 x)))

            (let X :=
               λ (C : category) 
               (a b : C)

               pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
             X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)

                       ·

                  (monoidal_unit

                · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V

               (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V

                     (pr21

                  (internal_paths_rew_r

                     (pr21 x)
                     (pr2
                       (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
                      · pr12 x)
                     (λ 
                      p : 
                       V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
                      pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ 
                       pr1 (monoidal_unit (...)),
                       pr11 x ⟧)
                       (identity (pr1 (...)) · pr12 x)
                       (pr12 x)
                       (λ 
                       p : V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧,
                       pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                       (id_right (pr12 x))
                       (id_left (pr12 x))) 
                     (! pr22 x))
                  (pr2
                     (pr2
                       (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total (...) (...))
                       x)
                      ·

                       ·

                       (V ⟦

                       (pr21 x)

                       (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (pr12 x) 
                       (...) 
                       (...)

                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                       (pr11 (...))

                       (pr22 (...))))

               (pr2

                       (monoidal_unit (...))) x))
                     (pr2

                  (id_right
                     (pr1
                       (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total ... ...)) f)) @
                   ! id_left
                       (pr1
                       (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total ... ...)) f)))
                  (pr2
                     (# (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total
                       (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                       (monoidal_unit ...))) f
                      · 
                      (identity
                       (pr1 (identity ... x')),,
                       total2_paths_f
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧) 
                       (pr21 x') 
                       (... · pr12 x') 
                       (λ ..., ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r ... ...
                       ... ... ... ...) 
                       (! pr22 x'))
                       (let X0 :=
                       λ ... ... ... ..., ... in
                       X0 V 
                       (...) 
                       (pr11 ...) 
                       (...) 
                       (pr21 ...) 
                       (...) 
                       (pr22 ...))))))
               (pr2

                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ 
                       monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                       (pr21 x)

                       (λ

                       pr12 x · ... = p)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                       (... · pr12 x) 
                       (pr12 x) 
                       (λ ..., ...) 
                       (id_right ...) 
                       (id_left ...)) 
                       (! pr22 x))
                      (let X0 :=
                       λ 
                       (C : category) 
                       (a b : C) 
                       (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),

                       X0 V 
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                       (pr11 (... x))
                       (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                       (pr21 (... x))

                       (pr22 (... x))))
                   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · 
                       ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
        (counit_ptdob Mon_V) x)) =

Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total

                    total2_paths_f
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                          pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
                         (pr2 (...) · pr12 x)
                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                          pr12 x · ... = p)
                         (internal_paths_rew_r
                            (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                            (... · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
                            (λ ..., ...)
                            (id_right ...)
                            (id_left ...)) (! pr22 x))
                      (let X0 :=
                         λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                         (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                         (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                         pr1 (...) in
                       X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                         (pr11 (... x))
                         (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                         (pr21 (... x))
                         (transportf (...) (...) (...))
                         (pr22 (... x))))
                   · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                        · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
        (counit_ptdob Mon_V) x)) =
pr2
  (id2
     (identity
        (coslice_cat_total
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) x)
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: coslice_cat_total
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
  (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
pr1
  (vcomp2
     ((λ x : coslice_cat_total
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
               (monoidal_unit

                  (monoidal_unit
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
               x)),,

         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
            (pr21 x)
            (pr2
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
             · pr12 x)
            (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧,
             pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V
                ⟦ pr1
                    (monoidal_unit

                pr11 x ⟧)
               (identity

                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V))) · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
               (λ p : V
                      ⟦ pr1
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧,
                pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
               (id_right (pr12 x)) (id_left (pr12 x)))
            (! pr22 x))
         (let X :=
            λ (C : category) (a b : C)
            (x0 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'0 : x0 = x'),
            pr1 (C a b x0 x' x1 x'0) in
          X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            (pr11 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
            (pr2
               (monoidal_unit
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
             · pr12 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                      · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
            (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)))
                  (pr21 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                          · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x ⟧)
                  (pr21 x)
                  (pr2
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)) · pr12 x)
                  (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                         pr11 x ⟧,
                   pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V
                      ⟦ pr1
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)), pr11 x ⟧)
                     (identity
                        (pr1 (monoidal_unit (...)))
                      · pr12 x) (pr12 x)
                     (λ p : V
                            ⟦ pr1
                                (monoidal_unit (...)),
                            pr11 x ⟧,
                      pr12 x · identity (pr11 x) = p)
                     (id_right (pr12 x))
                     (id_left (pr12 x))) (! pr22 x))
               (pr2
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V (...))
                           (monoidal_unit (...))) x)
                   · identity
                       (pr1
                          (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total (...)
                                (...)) x)))))
            (pr22 ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                    · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x)))),,
      (λ (x
          x' : coslice_cat_total
                 (coslice_cat_total V
                    (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))
       (f : coslice_cat_total
              (coslice_cat_total V
                 (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (monoidal_unit
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (identity

                        (coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                        (monoidal_unit
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)))) f)) @

                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)))) f)))

            λ (C : category) (a b : C)
            (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),

            (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
            (monoidal_unit
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))
            (pr1
               ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
            (pr2
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total
                     (coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                     (monoidal_unit
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V))) x)
             · pr1
                 ((identity
                     (pr1
                        (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total (...)
                              (...)) x)),,
                   total2_paths_f
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                         pr11 x ⟧) (pr21 x)
                        (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                         · pr12 x)
                        (λ p : V
                               ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                               pr11 x ⟧,
                         pr12 x · identity ... = p)
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ pr1 ..., pr11 x ⟧)
                           (identity ... · pr12 x)
                           (pr12 x)
                           (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                           (id_right (pr12 x))
                           (id_left (pr12 x)))
                        (! pr22 x))
                     (let X0 :=
                        λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                        (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                        (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                        pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                      X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        (pr11 ((...) x))
                        (pr2 (...) · pr12 (... x))
                        (pr21 ((...) x))
                        (transportf (mor_disp ... ...)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                              ... ... ... ... ...)
                           (pr2 ...)) (pr22 ((...) x))))
                  · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f))
            (pr2
               ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                 · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x'))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp
                  (pr2
                     (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V))) x))
                  (pr2
                     ((ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                       · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) x')))
               (id_right
                  (pr1
                     (# (identity
                           (coslice_cat_total
                              (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                              (monoidal_unit ...))) f)) @
                ! id_left
                    (pr1
                       (# (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   ...)
                                (monoidal_unit ...)))
                          f)))
               (pr2
                  (# (identity
                        (coslice_cat_total
                           (coslice_cat_total V
                              (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                           (monoidal_unit
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)))) f
                   · (identity
                        (pr1
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total ...
                                 ...) x')),,
                      total2_paths_f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                            pr11 x' ⟧) (pr21 x')
                           (pr2 (...) · pr12 x')

                            pr12 x' · ... = p)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V ⟦ ..., pr11 x' ⟧)
                              (... · pr12 x')
                              (pr12 x') (λ ..., ...)
                              (id_right ...)
                              (id_left ...))
                           (! pr22 x'))
                        (let X0 :=
                           λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                           (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                           (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                           pr1 (...) in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr11 (... x'))
                           (pr2 ... · pr12 (...))
                           (pr21 (... x'))
                           (transportf (...) (...)
                              (...)) (pr22 (... x')))))))
            (pr2
               ((identity
                   (pr1
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            (monoidal_unit ...)) x)),,
                 total2_paths_f

                      (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V, pr11 x
                       ⟧) (pr21 x)
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit (...))
                       · pr12 x)
                      (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                             pr11 x ⟧,

                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (V ⟦ pr1 (...), pr11 x ⟧)
                         (identity (...) · pr12 x)
                         (pr12 x)
                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., pr11 x ⟧,
                          pr12 x · ... = p)
                         (id_right (pr12 x))
                         (id_left (pr12 x)))
                      (! pr22 x))
                   (let X0 :=
                      λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                      (x0 x'0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                      (x1 x'1 : x0 = x'0),
                      pr1 (C a b x0 x'0 x1 x'1) in
                    X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                      (pr11 ((... · ...) x))
                      (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                       · pr12 ((...) x))
                      (pr21 ((... · ...) x))
                      (transportf
                         (mor_disp (...) (pr21 ...))
                         (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                            (pr21 x) (...) (...) (...)
                            (! pr22 x)) (pr2 (...)))
                      (pr22 ((... · ...) x))))
                · # (ptdptdob_to_ptdob Mon_V
                     · ptdob_to_ptdptdob Mon_V) f)))))
     (counit_ptdob Mon_V) x) =
pr1

        (coslice_cat_total
           (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (monoidal_unit
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))) x)

  Defined.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
pr1

     (disp_left_adjoint_unit
        adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat

     (((λ a

                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
        total2_paths_f
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V
              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                  (pr1 a'),
              bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                (pr1 a') ⟧)
             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                (pr1 a') (pr1 a) (pr1 a)

                (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)

             (λ p : V
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V

                    bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a') ⟧,
              identity
                (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                   (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a')) =
              p
              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                  (pr1 a) (pr1 a') (pr1 a')
                  (identity (pr1 a'))

                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a')))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V

                   (pr1 a') ⟧)
                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V

                   (identity (pr1 a')))
                (identity

                (λ p : V
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                       bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                         (pr1 a) (pr1 a') ⟧,
                 identity
                   (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a'))
                 · identity
                     (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))
                 · identity

                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a')) =

                      (pr1 a')) · p

                          Mon_V)))))
         (pr2

               (id_disp
                  (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon

                             (λ p : V
                                    ⟦ monoidal_unit
                                        Mon_V,
                                    monoidal_unit
                                      Mon_V ⟧,
                              p =
                              identity
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (idpath
                                (identity
                                   (monoidal_unit
                                      Mon_V)))
                             (id_right
                                (identity
                                   (monoidal_unit
                                      Mon_V))))
                          (id_right
                             (identity
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                              · identity
                                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
                       (let X0 :=
                          λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                          (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                          (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                          pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
                        X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                          (pr1
                             (identity
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   (...))
                                (monoidal_unit (...))))
                          (pr2
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                   Mon_V))
                           · pr1
                               (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                  (id_disp ...)))
                          (pr2
                             (identity
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   (...))
                                (monoidal_unit (...))))
                          (transportf
                             (mor_disp (pr2 (...))
                                (pr2 (...)))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (V
                                 ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                                 monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                                (... · ...
                                 · identity ...)
                                (identity ...
                                 · identity ...)
                                (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   (...) (...) (...)
                                   (...) (...) (...))
                                (id_right (...)))
                             (pr2
                                (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                   ...
                                 · ...%bicategory ...)))
                          (pr2
                             (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                (id_disp (...))))))))
              (pr1
                 (transportb
                    (λ α : prebicat_cells
                             bicat_of_cats
                             (identity
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   (monoidal_unit
                                      Mon_V)))
                             (identity
                                (coslice_cat_total V
                                   (monoidal_unit
                                      Mon_V))),
                     DispBicat.disp_2cells α
                       (id_disp
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V))
                       (id_disp
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)))
                    (vcomp_rinv
                       (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                          adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
                    (DispBicat.disp_id2
                       (id_disp
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)))))
              ((λ x : coslice_cat_total V
                        (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
                funextsec
                  (λ t : coslice_cat_total V
                           (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
                   fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                     (id_disp
                        (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                           Mon_V)) x t
                   · vcomp2
                       (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                          adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                       (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                          adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                       ^-1%bicategory
                       (bifunctor_on_objects
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V) x t) =
                   functoronmorphisms1
                     (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                        Mon_V)
                     (vcomp2
                        (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                        (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                        ^-1%bicategory x)
                     (vcomp2
                        (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                        (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                        ^-1%bicategory t)
                   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                       (id_disp
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)) x t)
                  (pr1
                     (DispBicat.disp_vcomp2
                        (disp_left_adjoint_unit
                           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                           disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                        ((λ a
                             a' : coslice_cat_total V
                                    (monoidal_unit
                                       Mon_V),
                          total2_paths_f
                            (internal_paths_rew_r
                               (...) (...) (...) (...)
                               (...) (...))
                            (let X0 := ... in
                             X0 V ... ... ... ... ...
                               ...)),,
                         total2_paths_f
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V
                               ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                               monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                              (... · ...
                               · identity ...)
                              (identity ...
                               · identity ...)
                              (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                              (internal_paths_rew_r
                                 (...) (...) (...)
                                 (...) (...) (...))
                              (id_right (...)))
                           (let X0 :=
                              λ (C : category)
                              (a b : C) (x0 x' : ...)
                              (x1 x'0 : ...), pr1 ...
                              in
                            X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                              (pr1 ...) (... · ...)
                              (pr2 ...)
                              (transportf ... ... ...)
                              (pr2 ...)))) x)
                  (pr1
                     (transportb
                        (λ α : prebicat_cells
                                 bicat_of_cats
                                 (identity
                                    (coslice_cat_total
                                       V ...))
                                 (identity
                                    (coslice_cat_total
                                       V ...)),
                         DispBicat.disp_2cells α
                           (id_disp
                              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                 Mon_V))
                           (id_disp
                              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                 Mon_V)))
                        (vcomp_rinv
                           (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                              adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
                        (DispBicat.disp_id2
                           (id_disp
                              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                 Mon_V)))) x)
                  ((λ x0 : coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
                    let X0 :=
                      λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                      (x1 x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                      (x2 x'0 : x1 = x'),
                      pr1 (C a b x1 x' x2 x'0) in
                    X0
                      (coslice_cat_total V
                         (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                      (bifunctor_on_objects
                         (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                            Mon_V)
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            x)
                         (identity
                            (coslice_cat_total V ...)
                            x0))
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects
                            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                               Mon_V) x x0))
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         (id_disp (...)) x x0
                       · vcomp2
                           (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                              adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                           (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                              adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                           ^-1%bicategory
                           (bifunctor_on_objects (...)
                              x x0))
                      (functoronmorphisms1
                         (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                            Mon_V)
                         (vcomp2 (...)
                            ... ^-1%bicategory x)
                         (vcomp2 (...)
                            ... ^-1%bicategory x0)
                       · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                           (id_disp (...)) x x0)
                      (pr1
                         (DispBicat.disp_vcomp2
                            (disp_left_adjoint_unit
                               adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                               disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                            (...,, ...)) x x0)
                      (pr1
                         (transportb (λ ..., ...)
                            (vcomp_rinv ...)
                            (DispBicat.disp_id2 ...))
                         x x0))
                   :

                     (DispBicat.disp_vcomp2
                        (disp_left_adjoint_unit
                           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                           disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                        ((λ a
                             a' : coslice_cat_total V
                                    ...,
                          total2_paths_f (...) (...)),,
                         total2_paths_f
                           (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                              (...) (...) (...) (...)
                              (...))
                           (let X0 := ... in
                            X0 V ... ... ... ... ...
                              ...))) x ~
                   pr1
                     (transportb
                        (λ α : prebicat_cells
                                 bicat_of_cats
                                 (identity ...)
                                 (identity ...),
                         DispBicat.disp_2cells α
                           (id_disp (...))
                           (id_disp (...)))
                        (vcomp_rinv
                           (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                              adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
                        (DispBicat.disp_id2

                              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                 Mon_V)))) x))
               :
               pr1
                 (DispBicat.disp_vcomp2
                    (disp_left_adjoint_unit
                       adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                       disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                    ((λ a
                         a' : coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
                      total2_paths_f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V
                            ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                Mon_V (...) (...),
                            bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                              (...) (...) ⟧)
                           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              Mon_V (pr1 a') (pr1 a)
                              (pr1 a) (identity ...))
                           (identity
                              (bifunctor_on_objects
                                 Mon_V ... ...))
                           (λ p : V ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                            ... · ... = ... · ...)
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                              (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 Mon_V ... ... ... ...)
                              (identity ...)
                              (λ ..., ...)
                              (idpath ...)
                              (bifunctor_leftid Mon_V
                                 ... ...))
                           (bifunctor_rightid Mon_V
                              (pr1 a') (pr1 a)))
                        (let X0 :=

                           (x x' : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧)
                           (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                           pr1 (...) in
                         X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           (pr1 (...))
                           (pr2 ... · pr1 ...)
                           (pr2 (...))
                           (transportf (...) (...)
                              (...)) (pr2 (...)))),,
                     total2_paths_f
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                           monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           · identity
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           · identity
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           · identity
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (λ p : V
                                 ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                                 monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,

                           identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                              monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                             (identity (...)
                              · identity (...))
                             (identity
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (λ p : V ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                              p = identity ...)
                             (idpath (identity ...))
                             (id_right (identity ...)))
                          (id_right
                             (identity (...)
                              · identity (...))))
                       (let X0 :=
                          λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                          (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                          (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                          pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
                        X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                          (pr1 (identity (...) (...)))
                          (pr2 (monoidal_unit ...)
                           · pr1
                               (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                  ...))
                          (pr2 (identity (...) (...)))
                          (transportf
                             (mor_disp (...) (...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (...) (...) (...)
                                (...) (...) (...))
                             (pr2 (...)))
                          (pr2

               pr1
                 (transportb
                    (λ α : prebicat_cells

                 ((λ a

                         ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V

                        (identity

                              ... ...)
