                         · identity
                             (bifunctor_on_objects
                                Mon_V (...) (...)))
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (V
                            ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                Mon_V (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                            bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                              (pr1 a) (pr1 a') ⟧)
                           (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                              Mon_V (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
                              (pr1 a')
                              (identity (pr1 a')))
                           (identity
                              (bifunctor_on_objects
                                 Mon_V (pr1 a)
                                 (pr1 a')))
                           (λ p : V
                                  ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                      Mon_V (...)
                                      (...),
                                  bifunctor_on_objects
                                    Mon_V (...) (...)
                                  ⟧,
                            identity ...
                            · identity ...
                            · identity (...) =
                            identity ... · p
                            · identity (...))
                           (idpath
                              (identity ...
                               · identity ...
                               · identity (...)))
                           (bifunctor_leftid Mon_V
                              (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
                        (bifunctor_rightid Mon_V
                           (pr1 a') (pr1 a)))
                     (let X0 :=
                        λ (C : category) (a0 b : C)
                        (x x' : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧)
                        (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                        pr1 (C a0 b x x' x0 x'0) in
                      X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        (pr1
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V
                                 (...))
                              (bifunctor_on_objects
                                 (...) a a')))
                        (pr2
                           (bifunctor_on_objects
                              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                 Mon_V) (... a)
                              (... a'))
                         · pr1
                             (functoronmorphisms1
                                (...) (...) (...)
                              · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                  (...) a a'))
                        (pr2
                           (identity
                              (coslice_cat_total V
                                 (...))
                              (bifunctor_on_objects
                                 (...) a a')))
                        (transportf
                           (mor_disp (pr2 (...))
                              (pr2 (...)))
                           (internal_paths_rew_r
                              (V
                               ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                   Mon_V ... ...,
                               bifunctor_on_objects
                                 Mon_V ... ... ⟧)
                              (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
                                 Mon_V (...) (...)
                                 (...) (...))
                              (identity (...))
                              (λ p : ..., ... = ...)
                              (internal_paths_rew_r
                                 (...) (...) (...)
                                 (...) (...) (...))
                              (bifunctor_rightid Mon_V
                                 (...) (...)))
                           (pr2
                              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                 ... a a'
                               · ...%bicategory ...)))
                        (pr2
                           (functoronmorphisms1
                              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                 Mon_V)
                              (...%bicategory a)
                              (...%bicategory a')
                            · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                (id_disp ...) a a')))),,
                  total2_paths_f
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                       (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        · identity
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        · identity
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        · identity
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                              monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
                        p =
                        identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                           monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           · identity
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (λ p : V
                                 ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                                 monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
                           p =
                           identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (idpath
                             (identity
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                          (id_right
                             (identity
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
                       (id_right
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           · identity
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
                    (let X0 :=
                       λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                       (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                       (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                       pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
                     X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                       (pr1
                          (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                   Mon_V))))
                       (pr2
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                Mon_V))
                        · pr1
                            (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                               (id_disp
                                  (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                     Mon_V))))
                       (pr2
                          (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total V
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                   Mon_V))))
                       (transportf
                          (mor_disp
                             (pr2
                                (monoidal_unit (...)))
                             (pr2
                                (identity (...) (...))))
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                              monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                             (identity (...)
                              · identity (...)
                              · identity
                                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (identity
                                (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                              · identity
                                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                             (λ p : V
                                    ⟦ monoidal_unit
                                        Mon_V,
                                    monoidal_unit
                                      Mon_V ⟧,
                              p = identity (...))
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (V
                                 ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                                 monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                                (identity ...
                                 · identity ...)
                                (identity (...))
                                (λ p : ..., p = ...)
                                (idpath (...))
                                (id_right (...)))
                             (id_right
                                (identity ...
                                 · identity ...)))
                          (pr2
                             (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                                   Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                              adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                              disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                              · (...) ^-1%bicategory

                       (pr2

                             (id_disp
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon

        (pr2
           (transportb
              (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
                       (identity

                       (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))),
               DispBicat.disp_2cells α
                 (id_disp
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon

                 (id_disp
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon

              (vcomp_rinv
                 (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
              (DispBicat.disp_id2
                 (id_disp
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       Mon_V)))))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
pr1
  (DispBicat.disp_vcomp2
     (((λ a
           a' : coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
        total2_paths_f
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V
              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                  (pr1 a'),
              bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                (pr1 a') ⟧)
             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                (pr1 a') (pr1 a) (pr1 a)
                (identity (pr1 a)))
             (identity
                (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                   (pr1 a')))
             (λ p : V
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                    bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a') ⟧,
              identity
                (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                   (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a')) =
              p
              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                  (pr1 a) (pr1 a') (pr1 a')
                  (identity (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a')))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V
                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a'),
                 bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)

                         (λ p : V ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                          ... · ... = ... · ...)
                         (idpath (... · ...))
                         (bifunctor_leftid Mon_V
                            (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
                      (bifunctor_rightid Mon_V
                         (pr1 a') (pr1 a))
                    :
                    pr1
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                            Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                       adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                       disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                         a a'
                       · (...) ^-1%bicategory
                           (bifunctor_on_objects ... a
                              a')) =
                    pr1
                      (functoronmorphisms1
                         (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                            Mon_V) (...%bicategory a)
                         (...%bicategory a')
                       · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                           (id_disp ...) a a'))
                   (pr2
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                            Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                       adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                       disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                         a a'
                       · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                            adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                         ^-1%bicategory
                           (bifunctor_on_objects
                              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                 Mon_V) a a'))))
                (pr2
                   (functoronmorphisms1
                      (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                         Mon_V)
                      ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                          adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                       ^-1%bicategory a)
                      ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                          adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                       ^-1%bicategory a')
                    · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        (id_disp
                           (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                              Mon_V)) a a'))))
          :
          is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw
            (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; 
             disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
               disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat
             :
             fmonoidal
               (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                  Mon_V)
               (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                  Mon_V)
               (adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
            (id_disp
               (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                  Mon_V)
             :
             fmonoidal
               (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                  Mon_V)
               (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                  Mon_V)
               (identity
                  (coslice_cat_total V
                     (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
            (left_equivalence_unit_iso
               adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat) ^-1%bicategory),,
         total2_paths_f
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
               monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
              (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                     monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
               p = identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                  monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                 (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                  · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
                  p = identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                 (idpath
                    (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                 (id_right
                    (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
              (id_right
                 (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                  · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
            :
            pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                 (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; 
                  disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                    disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat
                  :
                  fmonoidal
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       Mon_V)
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       Mon_V)
                    (adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                     · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
               · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                 ^-1%bicategory
                   (monoidal_unit
                      (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                         Mon_V))) =
            pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                 (id_disp
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       Mon_V)
                  :
                  fmonoidal
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       Mon_V)
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       Mon_V)
                    (identity
                       (coslice_cat_total V
                          (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))))
           (let X :=
              λ (C : category) (a b : C)
              (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
              pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
            X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
              (pr1
                 (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                          Mon_V))))
              (pr2
                 (monoidal_unit
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       Mon_V))
               · pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                      (id_disp
                         (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                            Mon_V))))
              (pr2
                 (identity
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                          Mon_V))))
              (transportf
                 (mor_disp
                    (pr2
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)))
                    (pr2
                       (identity
                          (coslice_cat_total V
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                          (monoidal_unit
                             (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                Mon_V)))))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                     monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                    (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                     · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                     · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                     · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                           monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
                     p =
                     identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                        monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
                       (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        · identity
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                              monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
                        p =
                        identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                       (idpath
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                       (id_right
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
                    (id_right
                       (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                        · identity
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                  :
                  pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                       (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                          Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                     adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                     disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat
                        :
                        fmonoidal
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)
                          (adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                           · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                               adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
                     · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                          adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                       ^-1%bicategory
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                               Mon_V))) =
                  pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                       (id_disp
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)
                        :
                        fmonoidal
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)
                          (identity
                             (coslice_cat_total V ...)))))
                 (pr2
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                       (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                          Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                     adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                     disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                     · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                          adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                       ^-1%bicategory
                         (monoidal_unit
                            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                               Mon_V)))))
              (pr2
                 (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                    (id_disp
                       (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                          Mon_V))))))
        (disp_left_adjoint_unit
           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
           disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat))) =
pr2
  (transportb
     (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
              (adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
               · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
              (adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
               · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat),
      DispBicat.disp_2cells α
        (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                                disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
        (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                                disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat))
     (vcomp_linv
        (left_equivalence_unit_iso
           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
     (DispBicat.disp_id2
        (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                                disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)))
 apply homset_property. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
pr1
  (DispBicat.disp_vcomp2
     (((λ a
           a' : coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V),
        total2_paths_f
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V
              ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                  (pr1 a'),
              bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                (pr1 a') ⟧)
             (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                (pr1 a') (pr1 a) (pr1 a)
                (identity (pr1 a)))
             (identity
                (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                   (pr1 a')))
             (λ p : V
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                    bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a') ⟧,
              identity
                (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                   (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a')) =
              p
              · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                  (pr1 a) (pr1 a') (pr1 a')
                  (identity (pr1 a'))
              · identity
                  (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a')))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V
                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                     (pr1 a'),
                 bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                   (pr1 a') ⟧)
                (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                   (pr1 a) (pr1 a') (pr1 a')
                   (identity (pr1 a')))
                (identity
                   (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a')))
                (λ p : V
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                       bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                         (pr1 a) (pr1 a') ⟧,
                 identity
                   (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a'))
                 · identity
                     (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))
                 · identity
                     (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a')) =
                 identity
                   (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a')) · p
                 · identity
                     (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
                (idpath
                   (identity
                      (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                         (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))
                    · identity
                        (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))
                    · identity
                        (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))))
                (bifunctor_leftid Mon_V (pr1 a)
                   (pr1 a')))
             (bifunctor_rightid Mon_V (pr1 a') (pr1 a))
           :
           pr1
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; 
                 disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                   adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                   disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                a a'
              · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                   adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                ^-1%bicategory
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                        Mon_V) a a')) =
           pr1
             (functoronmorphisms1
                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                   Mon_V)
                ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                 ^-1%bicategory a)
                ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                 ^-1%bicategory a')
              · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                  (id_disp
                     (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                        Mon_V)) a a'))
          (let X :=
             λ (C : category) (a0 b : C)
             (x x' : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
             pr1 (C a0 b x x' x0 x'0) in
           X V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
             (pr1
                (identity
                   (coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects
                      (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                         Mon_V) a a')))
             (pr2
                (bifunctor_on_objects
                   (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                      Mon_V)
                   ((adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                     · left_adjoint_right_adjoint

                      a)
                   ((adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                     · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                         adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                      a'))
              · pr1

                     (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                        Mon_V)
                     ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                         adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                      ^-1%bicategory a)
                     ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                         adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                      ^-1%bicategory a')
                   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                       (id_disp
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)) a a'))
             (pr2
                (identity
                   (coslice_cat_total V
                      (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                   (bifunctor_on_objects
                      (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                         Mon_V) a a')))
             (transportf
                (mor_disp
                   (pr2
                      (bifunctor_on_objects
                         (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                            Mon_V)
                         ((adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                           · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                               adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                            a)
                         ((adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                           · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                               adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                            a')))
                   (pr2
                      (identity
                         (coslice_cat_total V
                            (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                         (bifunctor_on_objects
                            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                               Mon_V) a a'))))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (V
                    ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                        (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                    bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr1 a)
                      (pr1 a') ⟧)
                   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                      (pr1 a') (pr1 a) (pr1 a)
                      (identity (pr1 a)))
                   (identity
                      (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                         (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
                   (λ p : V
                          ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                              (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                          bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                            (pr1 a) (pr1 a') ⟧,
                    identity
                      (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V ...
                         ...)
                    · identity
                        (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           ... ...)
                    · identity
                        (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           (...) (...)) =
                    p
                    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                        Mon_V (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
                        (pr1 a') (identity ...)
                    · identity
                        (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           (...) (...)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (V
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                           (pr1 a) (pr1 a'),
                       bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                         (pr1 a) (pr1 a') ⟧)
                      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
                         Mon_V (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
                         (pr1 a') (identity (pr1 a')))
                      (identity
                         (bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V
                            (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
                      (λ p : V
                             ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects
                                 Mon_V (...) (...),
                             bifunctor_on_objects
                               Mon_V (...) (...) ⟧,
                       identity ... · identity ...
                       · identity (...) =
                       identity ... · p
                       · identity (...))
                      (idpath
                         (identity ... · identity ...
                          · identity (...)))
                      (bifunctor_leftid Mon_V (pr1 a)
                         (pr1 a')))
                   (bifunctor_rightid Mon_V (pr1 a')
                      (pr1 a))
                 :
                 pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                      (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                         Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                    disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                      a a'
                    · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                         adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                      ^-1%bicategory
                        (bifunctor_on_objects
                           (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                              Mon_V) a a')) =
                 pr1
                   (functoronmorphisms1
                      (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                         Mon_V)
                      ((...) ^-1%bicategory a)
                      ((...) ^-1%bicategory a')
                    · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                        (id_disp
                           (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                              Mon_V)) a a'))
                (pr2
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                      (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                         Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                    disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
                      a a'
                    · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                         adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                      ^-1%bicategory
                        (bifunctor_on_objects
                           (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                              Mon_V) a a'))))
             (pr2
                (functoronmorphisms1
                   (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                      Mon_V)
                   ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                       adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                    ^-1%bicategory a)
                   ((left_equivalence_unit_iso
                       adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                    ^-1%bicategory a')
                 · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                     (id_disp
                        (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                           Mon_V)) a a'))))
       :
       is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw
         (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                                 adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                                 disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat
          :
          fmonoidal
            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V)
            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V)
            (adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
             · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
         (id_disp
            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V)
          :
          fmonoidal
            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V)
            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V)
            (identity
               (coslice_cat_total V
                  (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
         (left_equivalence_unit_iso
            adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat) ^-1%bicategory),,
      total2_paths_f
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
            monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
           (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
            · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                  monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
            p = identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
               monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧)
              (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (λ p : V ⟦ monoidal_unit Mon_V,
                     monoidal_unit Mon_V ⟧,
               p = identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
              (idpath (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
              (id_right
                 (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V))))
           (id_right
              (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
               · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
         :
         pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservesunit
              (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V ;; 
               disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                 adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                 disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat
               :
               fmonoidal
                 (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                    Mon_V)
                 (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                    Mon_V)
                 (adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                  · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                      adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
            · (left_equivalence_unit_iso
                 adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
              ^-1%bicategory
                (monoidal_unit
                   (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                      Mon_V))) =
         pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservesunit
              (id_disp
                 (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                    Mon_V)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
pr1
  (DispBicat.disp_vcomp2
     (disp_left_adjoint_counit
        adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
        disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat)
     (((λ a
           a' : coslice_cat_total
                  (coslice_cat_total V

                  (monoidal_unit

        total2_paths_f
          (total2_paths_f
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V
                 ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr11 a)
                     (pr11 a'),
                 bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V (pr11 a)
                   (pr11 a') ⟧)
                (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms Mon_V
                   (pr11 a') (pr11 a) (pr11 a)
                   (identity (pr11 a)))
                (identity

                      (pr11 a) (pr11 a')))
                (λ p : V
                       ⟦ bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V

                       bifunctor_on_objects Mon_V

                     (pr11 a) (pr11 a') (pr11 a')
                     (identity (pr11 a'))

                      (pr11 a) (pr11 a') (pr11 a')

Mon_V: monoidal V

                                  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                  disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat ;; 
                                ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                                  Mon_V)))
                       (pr2

                            · adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon

                                (monoidal_unit (...)))
                             (pr2 ((...) (...))))

                                disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat ;;

        (pr2

              (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
pr1

     (((λ a

                  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat

                 (monoidal_unit
                    (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                       (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                          Mon_V)))))
           (transportf
              (mor_disp
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V))))
                 (pr2
                    ((left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                        adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                      · adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                       (monoidal_unit
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                Mon_V))))))
              (total2_paths_f
                 (idpath
                    (identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                     · identity (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                 (let X0 :=
                    λ (C : category) (a b : C)
                    (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                    (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                    pr1 (C a b x x' x0 x'0) in
                  X0 V (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                    (pr11 ((left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                              adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                            · adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                   (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                      Mon_V)))))
                    (pr21 (monoidal_unit
                             (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                   Mon_V)))
                     · pr11 (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                               (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                  disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat ;; 
                                ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                                  Mon_V)))
                    (pr21 ((left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                              adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                            · adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                             (monoidal_unit
                                (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                   (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                      Mon_V)))))
                    (transportf
                       (mor_disp
                          (pr21 (monoidal_unit
                                   (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                      (...))))
                          (pr21 ((left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                  · adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                                   (monoidal_unit
                                      (...)))))
                       (idpath
                          (identity
                             (monoidal_unit Mon_V)
                           · identity
                               (monoidal_unit Mon_V)))
                       (pr21 (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                (id_disp
                                   (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                      ...))
                              · (left_equivalence_counit_iso
                                   adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                                ^-1%bicategory
                                  (monoidal_unit
                                     (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                                        ...)))))
                    (pr21 (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                             (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                                adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                                disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat ;; 
                              ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal
                                Mon_V)))))
              (pr2
                 (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                    (id_disp
                       (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                          (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                             Mon_V)))
                  · (left_equivalence_counit_iso
                       adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat)
                    ^-1%bicategory
                      (monoidal_unit
                         (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                            (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
                               Mon_V))))))
           (pr2
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                 (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
                    disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat ;; 
                  ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V)))))
     (disp_left_adjoint_counit
        adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
        disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat))
  x x0 =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ α : prebicat_cells bicat_of_cats
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))))
              (identity
                 (coslice_cat_total
                    (coslice_cat_total V
                       (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
                    (monoidal_unit
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)))),
      DispBicat.disp_2cells α
        (id_disp
           (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V)))
        (id_disp
           (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V))))
     (vcomp_linv
        (left_equivalence_counit_iso
           adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat))
     (DispBicat.disp_id2
        (id_disp
           (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon
              (MonoidalPointedObjects.ptd_ob_mon Mon_V)))))
  x x0

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
  (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
  (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
disp_left_adjoint_axioms
  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
  disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat
× disp_left_equivalence_axioms
    adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
    disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
disp_left_equivalence_axioms
  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
  disp_left_adjoint_data_ptdfunctor_in_moncat

    exact disp_left_equivalence_axioms_ptdfunctor_in_moncat.
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
adjoint_equivalence
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),,
   monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),,
   monoidal_pointed_objects
     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
adjoint_equivalence
  (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V),,
   monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
  (coslice_cat_total
     (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
     (monoidal_unit (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)),,
   monoidal_pointed_objects
     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∑
f : adjoint_equivalence
      (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
      (coslice_cat_total
         (coslice_cat_total V (monoidal_unit Mon_V))
         (monoidal_unit
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))),
disp_adjoint_equivalence f
  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
  (monoidal_pointed_objects
     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
  (monoidal_pointed_objects
     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_cat
  (ptdob_to_ptdptdob_fmonoidal Mon_V)

    exact disp_adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_moncat.
  Defined.

End PointedFunctorsIdempotentGeneralMonoidalCats.

Definition adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor (C : category)
  : adjoint_equivalence
      (B := monbicat)
      (_ ,, pointedfunctors_moncat C)
      (_ ,, monoidal_pointed_objects (pointedfunctors_moncat C))
  := adj_equivalence_ptdfunctor_in_moncat (monoidal_of_endofunctors C).
